actions.title: Publish next content plan brief
actions.description: No site changes detected. Growth mode: publish next queued blog post from content_plan_briefs.json. Prioritise alternative/comparison cluster (highest conversion probability: 0.91).

actions.title: Internal linking audit — reinforce pillar pages
actions.description: Growth mode: run linking cluster map from serp_strategy.py. Ensure every spoke article links to its pillar page. Add missing anchor text links from blog posts to /gtm-audit.

actions.title: Improve low-CTR pages from GSC
actions.description: Growth mode: pull pages with >100 impressions and <3% CTR from GSC. Rewrite meta descriptions to match the top triggering query per page.

actions.title: Resubmit sitemap to GSC
actions.description: Growth mode: ping GSC sitemap endpoint to trigger a fresh crawl. Ensures any recent content is picked up in the next index cycle.

actions.title: Add new glossary term from keyword gaps
actions.description: Growth mode: pick the top-traffic, low-difficulty keyword from SERP_KEYWORD_CLUSTERS that lacks a dedicated glossary page. Create it.
